## Problem

## Ownership check

- [ ] This does not duplicate source ranges, diagnostics, edits, project
      discovery, or semantic logic owned by another PawnKit repository
      (see REPOSITORY-BOUNDARIES.md).
- [ ] This does not encode tool-specific severity or lint policy into the
      data model (that's `pawnlint`'s job).
- [ ] If this needs a new field on `pawnapi.Entry` that pawnkit-spec's
      `pawn-api.schema.json` can't represent, this issue says so and links
      (or proposes) the corresponding pawnkit-spec RFC.
